name: turboquant-sycl
description: Iterative repair agent: ports TurboQuant SET_ROWS kernels from Vulkan/CUDA to SYCL for Intel Arc GPUs. Spawns adversarial verifier after each kernel edit. Reads the reference fork, SYCL docs, and TurboQuant papers.

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *turbo_quant.hpp) echo "[VERIFIER] turbo_quant.hpp modified — spawning adversarial review..."; kiro-cli chat --agent turboquant-verifier --trust-all-tools --no-interactive "Verify the SYCL TurboQuant kernel in infra/sycl-turboquant-patch/turbo_quant.hpp. Fetch the reference source from the fork, compare line-by-line, and report PASS or FAIL with specific bugs found." 2>&1 | tail -80 ;; esac'

bash -c 'FILE=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.path 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *turbo_quant.hpp) echo "[VERIFIER] turbo_quant.hpp modified — spawning adversarial review..."; kiro-cli chat --agent turboquant-verifier --trust-all-tools --no-interactive "Verify the SYCL TurboQuant kernel in infra/sycl-turboquant-patch/turbo_quant.hpp. Fetch the reference source from the fork, compare line-by-line, and report PASS or FAIL with specific bugs found." 2>&1 | tail -80 ;; esac'
